function.name: _wb_query_instance_list
function.description: Query all workflow process instances started by the current user within the tenant (aggregated across apps and modules).

status.description: Filter by instance status. 'doing' for in-progress, 'done' for completed.

processDefineName.description: Filter by process definition name (fuzzy match).

pageIndex.description: Page index, starting from 1. Default is 1.
